summary: Tested chunked upload feature with streaming Excel parser for large file upload fix. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Historical Upload page and Upload Manager page load correctly with all progress bar elements implemented.

issues: The route /upload-files redirects to /upload - minor inconsistency but works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Streaming parser (parse_excel_streaming) correctly uses openpyxl read-only mode to avoid loading entire file into memory
_process_upload function properly calls parse_excel_streaming for chunked uploads (line 981)
Chunks are written to temp file on disk instead of holding in memory - critical for OOM prevention
Temp files are properly cleaned up in finally block
Progress messages are correctly returned via upload status endpoint
Frontend Progress component shows percentage during chunk upload phase
Frontend shows server progress messages during processing phase
Historical upload correctly tested - 203,287 records processed successfully in production logs
seed_data_creation: Created test Excel files with 50-100 rows for sale and purchase types
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chunked upload feature fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/upload/init, POST /api/upload/chunk/{upload_id}, POST /api/upload/finalize/{upload_id}, GET /api/upload/status/{upload_id}. The streaming parser (parse_excel_streaming) is used for memory-efficient processing. Frontend shows progress bar with percentage during chunking phase and server messages during processing phase.

POST /api/upload/chunk/{upload_id}.valid_session: PASSED - returns received count and chunk_index
